name: vscode-theme-seti-folder
description: Seti icons with folder for VS Code

commands.title: Seti Folder Icons: Show Available Icons

setiFolder.useOnAllFolders.description: Apply Seti Folder Icons to all folders. When disabled, only folders matching folder associations will get custom icons.

setiFolder.folderAssociations.description: Map folder names to icon names. For example: { "src": "_folder_dark", "node_modules": "_npm", "test": "_javascript_1" }. Available icon names can be found in the icon theme definition file.

.*.description: The icon definition ID to use for this folder name.
